title: 1/8 Acre Freehold Residential Plot in Hindi, Lamu West (LAPSSET Corridor)
location_details: Hindi Ward, Lamu West Sub-County, within the LAPSSET development corridor, near Hindi and Mokowe towns
description: Strategic freehold land parcel located in Hindi, Lamu West, within the LAPSSET development corridor. This 1/8 acre residential plot is ideal for land banking, residential development, or holiday homes. The land is well-drained, serviced by existing KPLC power infrastructure and water lines, and accessible via an established murram road network. Proximity to the new Lamu Port, Indian Ocean coastline, and key administrative centers positions this property for strong capital appreciation.
investment_highlights: Near the new Lamu Port and infrastructure projects

title: 1/4 Acre Freehold Residential Plot in Hindi, Lamu West (LAPSSET Corridor)
location_details: Hindi Ward, Lamu West Sub-County, near Hindi administrative center and Mokowe
description: Prime 1/4 acre freehold residential plot located in Hindi, Lamu West, within the high-growth LAPSSET corridor. The land features ready title deeds, established power and water infrastructure, and murram road access. Its coastal proximity and closeness to the new Lamu Port make it ideal for residential development, holiday homes, or long-term investment.

title: 1/2 Acre Freehold Residential Plot in Hindi, Lamu West (LAPSSET Corridor)
location_details: Hindi Ward, Lamu West Sub-County, LAPSSET development zone near Lamu Port
description: Spacious 1/2 acre freehold plot in Hindi, Lamu West, positioned within the LAPSSET corridor. Suitable for high-end residential development, holiday homes, or institutional investment. The property has ready title deeds, reliable power and water infrastructure, good road access, and strong long-term appreciation prospects due to nearby port and logistics developments.
